steps.title: Compare to the old model
steps.content:
The old line of best fit has slope $8.8$. At $x=9$, the old model predicts
$$
y=-5.6+8.8(9)=73.6
$$

steps.title: Use the new point
steps.content: The new point is $(9,52)$, which is far below $73.6$. A far-right point below the old trend pulls the new best-fit slope down.

steps.title: Choose the lower slope
steps.content: The new slope should be less than $8.8$. Among the choices, $5.9$ is the only reasonable lower estimate. The answer is A.
